## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the sklearn API (`fit`/`predict`/`transform`)
- [ ] Tests are included and pass (`pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`ruff check endgame/`)
- [ ] New public classes are exported from `__init__.py`
- [ ] Docstrings are present (Google style, with parameters and examples)
- [ ] Optional dependencies are handled with graceful import errors
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (if applicable)
